notes:
New: multi-language support. PersonaOS now supports British English, German, French, and Spanish as your primary working language — and reply drafts automatically match the language of incoming emails (German in → German reply, French in → French reply, etc.).

To enable: re-run the PersonaOS setup wizard, choose your primary language on the Persona step, and paste the new script into Apps Script (overwrite Code.gs). Your API key, persona profiles, and triggers are preserved — they live in Script Properties and are untouched.
patchInstructions:
New feature — multi-language support (British English / German / French / Spanish):

Reply drafts now auto-match the language of incoming emails (German in → German reply, etc), and you can set a primary working language for outbound communication.

  1. Re-run the PersonaOS setup wizard
  2. On the Persona step, choose your primary working language
  3. Generate the new script and paste it into Apps Script (overwrite Code.gs)
  4. Save (Ctrl+S)

Your API key, persona profiles, and triggers are preserved — all stored in Script Properties.
